programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 4 mad men, starving for dopamine and thrills, are setting off in search of the 'craziest' challenges hidden around the world.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Lee Je-hoon, Lee Dong-hwi, Cha Eun-woo, and Kwak Dong-yeon will leave their urban lives behind to experience the serene and picturesque rural life in Finland.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 2PM's Chansung will explore different restaurants, taste popular menus and recreate them with his own recipes!

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: Judge Lee Han-young, who regains consciousness after an unjust death, returns to the past to punish the wrongdoers and change his fate.

programme.title: Don't Cry This At Home
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand look at the cool bit of body kit that sucks your tears away when you cry, and Dr. Dan and Dr. Raph prepare for lift-off in a mind-boosting mission to space.

programme.title: The Pitmans: Martial Arts Dynamic Duo
programme.desc: Lisa and Chris Pitman are a married couple who hold the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most concrete blocks broken in thirty seconds by a mixed team of two. The couple shares what it takes to become the best in the world in martial arts.

programme.title: Why We Explore
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli makes the case for space exploration. Astronauts have reported a profound change in perspective when looking back at the earth from space, which they believe could change the world if experienced by others.

programme.title: Don't Cry This At Home
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand look at the cool bit of body kit that sucks your tears away when you cry, and Dr. Dan and Dr. Raph prepare for lift-off in a mind-boosting mission to space.

programme.title: Going For Gold
programme.desc: In this episode, the female Elite team head to Brussels to battle the best artistic gymnasts in Europe at the start of the season, but for Amelie, one of the UK's brightest young stars, things take a dramatic twist.

programme.title: The Elephant Yam Trap
programme.desc: The elephant yam attracts beetles with its smell. Then it traps them and covers them in pollen before sending them off to bring the pollen to other yams.

programme.title: Kiwifruit Valley Flower Show
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni compete in the Kiwifruit Valley Flower Show and have to get creative when things don't go to plan.

programme.title: Environmental Science
programme.desc: How do sea animals stay warm in extreme cold? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of environmental science. Have hands-on fun by creating a blubber glove, and get to know Rachel Carson, a marine biologist and chief advocate of global environmentalism.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Suspicious Circles
programme.desc: When crop circles begin appearing in Ayrton Park, Alex suspects visitors from the fourth dimension, but Addison begins sleuthing in search of a different explanation.

programme.title: On the Spoor of the Big Snake - Part 1: The Serpent's Nest
programme.desc: Five young explorers set off to [Ai] Ais/Richtersveld Transfrontier Park in South Africa in search of the legendary Big Snake, a spirit that can transform itself into anything. They set up camp and learn about the region from local people.

programme.title: Old Math is New Again
programme.desc: In this episode we travel to ancient Egypt to explore an age-old multiplication method. How is this ancient method of multiplication, using ‘times two', similar to that used by modern computers? Eric will find out by conducting a range of fun experiments.

programme.title: Eyeball Action
programme.desc: How do you see the world in three dimensions? Find out as the doctors reveal the incredible eye muscles that control how you focus on things close-up and far away. Meanwhile, in the Emergency Department, Ted has a big cut on his head, and Millie has a sore foot.

programme.title: Blood
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand are back in their kitchen lab! In today's episode, the doctors break down blood and show you how to make an amazing blood lava lamp!

programme.title: The Frog in The Fog
programme.desc: A heavy sea fog rolls in while Darwin and Burpee are on the island, so Newts and Kea need to build a lighthouse to help them navigate the waka home.

programme.title: Could We Do Without Plankton?
programme.desc: Plankton are the foundations of the ocean food chain. Without them, pretty much nothing could survive. A single teaspoon of sea water can contain over one million living organisms.

programme.title: Don't Cry This At Home
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand look at the cool bit of body kit that sucks your tears away when you cry, and Dr. Dan and Dr. Raph prepare for lift-off in a mind-boosting mission to space.

programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Spiked - The Insidious Use Of Knockout Drops
programme.desc: Knockout drops: colorless, tasteless and extremely dangerous. They've been around for decades and are used to incapacitate people in order to rob, rape and even kill them.

programme.title: Succession Within A Family Business
programme.desc: Corentin is 28 years old and a farmer in Belgium. He wants to take over the family farm, which is 100 years old-and to do so, he has to take on a massive amount of debt. In this film, we follow Corentin and his father to the notary-and wonder: Will he really go through with it?

programme.title: Born Premature - Overcoming A Difficult Start In Life
programme.desc: 15 million children are born preterm each year, not all survive. In Good Shape explores efforts to develop artificial placentas and wombs - and the ethical questions involved.

programme.title: A Woman In The Well Of Death: India's Bravest Stunt Driver
programme.desc: Rehana Khan is one of India's few female stunt drivers. She tours the country's fairgrounds, drawing crowds as she rips around the 'Well of Death” on her motorcycle - a massive wooden structure with vertical walls. This danger is only compounded by the difficulty in making ends meet for her family as India's travelling fairs struggle to compete with modern entertainment.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

Regaining momentum, Nobunaga renews his attack on the Azai and Asakura clans, forcing Azai Nagamasa into a desperate stand at Odani Castle. With the siege tightening, Koichiro and Tokichiro attempt to save Ichi.

programme.title: E26 - The Sleep Eater
programme.desc: When Chowder knocks his internal clock out of whack, he becomes an unstoppable sleep eater!

programme.title: E27 - The Bruised Bluenana
programme.desc: Panini tricks Chowder into nursing an injured bluenana.

programme.title: E18 - Safety Last
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs. However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.title: E7 - Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to a taco throwdown for the taco king, actor and restaurateur Danny Trejo. For the Quickfire, the only sharp tool they can use is a machete, in honor of one of Danny’s signature characters.

programme.title: E7 - Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to a taco throwdown for the taco king, actor and restaurateur Danny Trejo. For the Quickfire, the only sharp tool they can use is a machete, in honor of one of Danny’s signature characters.

programme.title: E27 - The Bruised Bluenana
programme.desc: Panini tricks Chowder into nursing an injured bluenana.

programme.title: E18 - Safety Last

However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

programme.title: E13 - Don't Let The Bass Drop
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen are excited to attend an Earth Day EDM concert in Portland until the show is hijacked by the sound-manipulating baddy, Lord Decibel, who uses sound as a weapon to trash the planet.

programme.title: E15 - Animo Farm
programme.desc: Ben stumbles into Dr. Animo's secret lab - now ruled by his superior mutants, the Alphas - and must help the lesser animals escape while stuck as 'stinkfly'.

programme.title: E24 - Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: During Chefapalooza in the Rocky Mountains, three famous chefs and infamous bad-guys, The Tri-Chefta, hunt down Wildvine in hopes of creating their most exotic dish to date.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.title: E3 - Strokes Of Genius
programme.desc: Comedic superstars Ali Wong and Randall Park swing by the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire Challenge tasking the chefs to make the wackiest fried rice they can. Then, the chefs head to the famed Getty Museum to seek inspiration from one of four historical art movements to create a masterpiece on their plate. Guest Judge Ludo Lefebvre joins Tom, Padma and Gail, as well as guest diners Chefs Ray Garcia, Sara Hymanson, Sarah Kramer and Craig Thornton.

With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs. However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

programme.title: E7 - Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to a taco throwdown for the taco king, actor and restaurateur Danny Trejo. For the Quickfire, the only sharp tool they can use is a machete, in honor of one of Danny’s signature characters.

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Exper
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: E405 - Pups Save A Sleepover / Pups Save The Carnival
programme.desc: Farmer Al's animals go missing during a sleepover. // Cornelius has escaped from the pig ride at the carnival, and the prizes have gone missing too!

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad / Time Out / Cookies
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: E230 - Cuckoo Clock
programme.desc: Daddy Pig winds up the old cuckoo clock. When a wooden cuckoo pops out singing “Cuckoo!”, Peppa thinks it is very funny, but George has missed the whole thing. George does not want to miss the cuckoo again but the cuckoo only pops out once an hour.

programme.title: E234 - Dens
programme.desc: Peppa is playing in the tree-house with the girls, and George and the boys stay in the castle that Grandpa Pig built for them. But when it starts to rain and the garden is covered in muddy puddles, they rush out to play together!

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Exper
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: E109 - Astrofools
programme.desc: It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop.

programme.title: E234 - Dens
programme.desc: Peppa is playing in the tree-house with the girls, and George and the boys stay in the castle that Grandpa Pig built for them. But when it starts to rain and the garden is covered in muddy puddles, they rush out to play together!

programme.title: E237 - Rebecca Rabbit
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to Rebecca Rabbit's house today. It is a bit different to Peppa's house; it is inside a hill, with tunnels instead of stairs. They enjoy playing rabbits and everyone is surprised when George discovers he likes carrots!

programme.title: E117 - Cattle Drive
programme.desc: When Blaze and Starla encounter a herd of cows wandering out in the desert, they must embark on a wild west adventure to bring them back to Starla's barn.

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Exper
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: E312 - The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: E101 - Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E803 - Video Game Land A Monster Machine Super Special Part 2
programme.desc: Welcome to VIDEO GAME LAND! When Blaze and Crusher get zapped into a magic arcade machine, they must beat four epic levels to win the game and return back home. Are they up for the challenge? Or will this adventure end in a GAME OVER?!

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Exper
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: E848 - Science Museum
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go on a school trip to visit a science museum. There are lots of fun activities including bubbly water, static balloons and Grampy Rabbit's rocket ship.

programme.title: E850 - Windmills
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at playgroup and Mr Bull is building a wind turbine. Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, whilst Mr Bull and the workmen have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power.

programme.title: E851 - Mandy Mouse's Birthday
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse has a birthday visit to a cheese theme park with Peppa and her friends. Everything in the park is cheese-themed - Mandy loves cheese!

programme.title: E226 - The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: E113 - Stuck On You / Pest Friend
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile try to help Roland find a best friend to take to an acorn show.

programme.title: E608 - Pups Save Bedtime / Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
programme.desc: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle. They tried to call the Paw Patrol, but their phone cut out! // Chickaletta has laid an egg, but it's rolled away and is heading through town. The Paw Patrol has to catch it before it breaks.

programme.title: E101 - Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E101 - Catch The Quickatoo / Lost Lorito
programme.desc: Abuela shows Dora her photo album of birds, with one page blank: the Quickatoo. Dora vows to find the Quickatoo and get a picture to complete the album. // Dora and Boots help a baby parrot named Lorito find his Mami, but he can't stop copying Boots!

programme.title: E76 - B. Rattleballs/The Red Throne/Betty/Billy's Bucket List/Bad Timing
programme.desc: Finn practices his sword fighting skills at the candy junkyard, where he meets an old gumball robot named Rattleballs. To Finn's shock, he finds out he's NOT the master swordsman he thinks he is. What the what?! Finn begs Rattleballs to train him, but he soon discovers his mentor's deep, dark secret... a secret that will ultimately test Finn's loyalty to Princess Bubblegum.

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Join Kii & Yii for songs about feeling good & staying safe! First, learn the best way to get a healthy smile in a fun & educational song about how to brush your teeth properly. Then, learn how to be safe when you're riding a bike at the playground. The lessons continue as Kii & Yii sing about being kind to each other, especially when a friend is sick. From learning colors to singing a soothing lullaby, these songs will make you feel good!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Guide to Staying Healthy!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a guide to staying healthy & happy! The learning starts with hygiene, as JJ & his friends learn the importance of washing their hands & how to scrub-a-dub-dub in the bath. Then, it's time for some big milestones! Sing along as JJ learns to use the potty & TomTom learns what happens when you lose a tooth. Plus, join the Melon Patch kids as they visit the doctor for a checkup & learn that it's nothing to be afraid of!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E2 - The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: Join Digley & Dazey as they face the biggest, craziest disasters! First, a big thunderstorm hits while the crew is working, & they have to rescue Scout after she gets trapped down a hole! Then, while working on a railway bridge, an earthquake causes it to almost fall apart, & the team must fix it before a train crosses! From escaping an avalanche they accidentally caused on a mountain to helping a baby lion that has escaped from the zoo, it's a day of big disasters!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Learns to Take Care of Himself!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to take care of himself! Join the family as they learn the right way to brush their teeth. When JJ gets nervous about his first trip to the dentist, TomTom & YoYo are there to show him it's not so scary! The self-care continues as the kids learn about fire drill safety with Nina & help Mom & Dad with spring cleaning by becoming 'Clean Machines'! It's a day of learning healthy habits & routines!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. programme.title: E8 - Calming Colors
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Guide to Staying Healthy!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a guide to staying healthy & happy! The learning starts with hygiene, as JJ & his friends learn the importance of washing their hands & how to scrub-a-dub-dub in the bath. Then, it's time for some big milestones! Sing along as JJ learns to use the potty & TomTom learns what happens when you lose a tooth. Plus, join the Melon Patch kids as they visit the doctor for a checkup & learn that it's nothing to be afraid of!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Join Kii & Yii for songs about feeling good & staying safe! First, learn the best way to get a healthy smile in a fun & educational song about how to brush your teeth properly. Then, learn how to be safe when you're riding a bike at the playground. The lessons continue as Kii & Yii sing about being kind to each other, especially when a friend is sick. From learning colors to singing a soothing lullaby, these songs will make you feel good!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes

programme.title: E518 - Cold Fury
programme.desc: In Tulsa, detectives scour the city for a man on the run while trying to uncover the truth behind a woman's mysterious injuries.

programme.title: E7 - Until Murder Do Us Part
programme.desc: When a 70-year-old grandmother passes away suspiciously on a road trip, investigators uncover a sinister murder plot while searching for her remains.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: A man gets licked by a ghost. Next, Miss Malaysia Soo Wincci's has strange experiences after acting in a horror drama. Later, a murdered jogger returns.

programme.title: E5 - The Deltona Family Murders
programme.desc: When a young mother and her two children vanish after a violent argument fuelled by jealousy, a Florida community fears they may have crossed paths with a killer closer to home.

programme.title: E4 - Jesse Holton
programme.desc: Jesse Holton sits down for a high-stakes polygraph test with retired FBI examiner George Olivo. In 2016, Jesse became a suspect after a dispute with his parents ended in their brutal deaths.

programme.title: E7 - A Tell Tale Heart
programme.desc: When the body of a Jane Doe is found dumped on a roadside, it's up to Dr. Satish Chundru to identify her and find out how she died, spawning an investigation retracing the victim's last night.

programme.title: E4 - Lia (Part B)
programme.desc: Lia's hoarding went into overdrive when her three sons moved out, and Lia's husband, Ken, worked full time. After a severe blood infection, Lia realizes the extreme danger her home presents to her.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. European Le Mans Series Highlights 2026 -Le Castellet
E3 - Royal Enfield Bullet Engine
programme.desc: Jimmy travelled to India, on the hunt for the legendary single cylinder, air-cooled engine that powers the Royal Enfield Bullet.

programme.title: E2 - Gran Sport
programme.desc: A numbers-matching Buick Gran Sport is not ready for a full restoration, so the girls tackle some wear parts in the suspension, steering, and brakes.

programme.title: E5 - Custom Sasquatch Bronco
programme.desc: In one of the shop's most intricate metal projects ever, Bill and his team hand make a one-of-a-kind engine bay for the '68 GTO out of steel and aluminum.

programme.desc: A numbers-matching Buick Gran Sport is not ready for a full restoration, so the girls tackle some wear parts in the suspension, steering, and brakes.

programme.title: E13 - Jeep Back Half
programme.desc: Bumpus and Fuller build the entire rear section of a Jeep TJ. They weld on a new frame, add some 2x2 square tubing for a rear section, and add new bumpers.

programme.title: E3 - Citroen H Van
programme.desc: The duo buy an ancient Citroen H-Van they found rotting in a field. Needing a whole new chassis- have they bitten off more than they can chew?

programme.desc: Aaron is asked to create the smallest British pub ever. Along with a Western bar revamp, the team must switch between styles to perfect both projects in time.

programme.title: E15 - 夢幻城堡「好戲」即將上演
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: E5 - 深入巴楚尋找「最強足球少年」
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E12 - 中年雄競開啟
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E6 - Flying Over The Mountains
programme.desc: To learn more about backcountry skiing, Alexis and Thomas travel to Golden, British Columbia, where they experience two extremes: the luxury of heliskiing and the simple life of ''ski bums.''

programme.title: Ligue 1 Mcdonald's - Avant-Matchs:2025-2026
programme.desc: Presenting the next day of the French football championship.

programme.title: E34 - The Book
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: E12 - Here's A Ladybird
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Oscar ET Malika, Toujours En Retard S3
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar ET Malika, Toujours En Retard S3
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2:2025-2026
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: September 1994. French President Francois Mitterrand had to manage a complicated cohabitation with Prime Minister Edouard Balladur. The publication of a book by the journalist Pierre Pean, tracing his career under the Vichy government, forced the Head of State to justify himself to the French people.

programme.title: 64' Actu:2025-2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'actu:2025-2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: E34 - Scritch Scratch Dip And Splash!
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E21 - Rebel Mother
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: E17 - Afsa Has Doubts
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info:2025-2026
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.desc: Fun and learning for pre-schoolers

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.desc: The Wow series is explores the provinces of the Philippines, delving into its history, culture, natural resources, and people, developed with the support of Forest Foundation Philippines.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: This is a story between the mole in the police department, Ming(Andy Lau) and the undercover cop, Yan(Tony Leung), who are competing to uncover each other first...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E275 -Atonement
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Stars in Focus: Daniel Wu: Don't Go Breaking My Heart
programme.desc: Yen is a single girl from China working in an IT company in Hong Kong. Overwhelmed by the hustle and bustle of this sleepless city, she feels increasingly like a fish out of water. Until she meets a handsome hunk, Sean and an elite architect, Kevin. Yen is no longer alone and lonely, but will she be able to find her true love?

programme.title: Don't Go Breaking My Heart 2
programme.desc: After the “Earthling” Cheung ShenRen loses Cheng Zixin to the “Martian” Fang Qihong, he decides to keep it cool and reverts to singlehood graciously. Cheng and Fang, meanwhile, live happily ever after. After jilted by Cheng, Cheung starts dating “Goddess of Stocks” Yang YangYang, who works in an opposite building. Yang has been turning a blind eye to Cheung's philandering until she meets Paul, a romantic returnee from France whose devotion has melted her heart....

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: A firefight occurs at the 'Bridge of No Return' in the DMZ (De-Militarized Zone), and two North Korean soldiers are killed. The North claims that the incident was a flagrant attack by the South Koreans, while the South claims that one of their soldiers was kidnapped. In order to solve the dispute, the NNSC (Neutral Nations Supervisory Commission) dispatches half-Korean half-Swiss Army Intelligence Bureau officer, Major Sophie E. Jean. With no cooperation from either side, the case appears to be unsolvable. However, Major Jean discovers that the number of bullets fired from the pistols and the number found at the scene differ by one, and she begins to dig deeper into the backgrounds of the soldiers involved. Subsequently, she finds out about an encounter previous to the firefight when North Korean soldiers saved a South Korean soldier from a mine. The story unravels to reveal a friendship developed among the soldiers that involved in that firefight...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E275 -Atonement
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: E526
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.desc: The love and success story of a self-made jjajangmyeon delivery driver.

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E4 - Bears on the Move
programme.desc: Beni and Lala are going stir crazy in the sick bay, but they must recover before returning to the rough and tumble of class. And at forest school, a termite-foraging lesson inspires class clown Valentino to make a finger-licking discovery.

programme.title: E2 - Coasts
programme.desc: Venture along Earth’s coasts, where colliding worlds create a melting pot of biodiversity. Watch orcas hunt with precision, hold on as guillemot chicks take leaps of faith, crawl to safety with turtle hatchlings, and see crabs sculpt sandy galaxies.

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E4 - Bears on the Move
programme.desc: Beni and Lala are going stir crazy in the sick bay, but they must recover before returning to the rough and tumble of class. And at forest school, a termite-foraging lesson inspires class clown Valentino to make a finger-licking discovery.

programme.title: E4 - The Protectors
programme.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E1 - Search for the Secret Bear
programme.desc: The forests of Yala National Park are home to the enigmatic sloth bear. Shy by nature, this animal is seldom seen and rarely filmed. Join a team of wildlife filmmakers as they reveal this mysterious bear’s life and behaviour as never seen before.

programme.title: E2 - Dilla’s Surprise
programme.desc: Crash a fruit-flinging party celebrating the return of Jelapat, Talaken, Bawan, and Rona to the nursery to join the rest of their classmates. Meanwhile, flooding overtakes the pre-release islands, and injuries stifle the progress of two students.

programme.title: E4 - Bears on the Move
programme.desc: Beni and Lala are going stir crazy in the sick bay, but they must recover before returning to the rough and tumble of class. And at forest school, a termite-foraging lesson inspires class clown Valentino to make a finger-licking discovery.

programme.title: E1 - City of Riches
programme.desc: Stake out the Bay Family’s lush territory, where matriarch Anna offers lavish feasts but faces internal dissent. Size up her rival Mia, the streetwise Townies leader who’s eyeing a lifestyle upgrade, and check in with the isolated Mangrove Family.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of Volcanoes
programme.desc: Bask in the interconnected lives of wildlife shaped by volcanoes, forests, and seas. Take flight with rare Philippine eagles as they raise their young in an ancient tree, then dive into a river to catch a glimpse of the world’s rarest crocodile.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E100
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E18 - Art Deco Exhibition/Woad/Manufacture Joseph Duclos/Wide Shoulders
programme.desc: With the Art Deco movement now over a century old we look back at the exhibition ''Art Deco France/North America'' at the Cite de l'Architecture et du Patrimoine. The story of woad. All the expertise of the Joseph Duclos Manufacture Royale recounted by Ramesh Nair. Wearing clothes with wide shoulders.

programme.title: E36 - Argy - Boussay
programme.desc: An old fortified manor of Berry, the Argy castle is located near Bourges. Its current owner is a direct descendant of the original lords who built it. Originally a medieval fortress built during the Crusades, the Boussay castle became a Renaissance residence and later an agricultural estate.

programme.title: E6 - Flying Over The Mountains
programme.desc: To learn more about backcountry skiing, Alexis and Thomas travel to Golden, British Columbia, where they experience two extremes: the luxury of heliskiing and the simple life of ''ski bums.''

programme.title: E14 - Imane Ayissi
programme.desc: The designer and ambassador for African fabric Imane Ayissi presents his haute couture collection for the autumn-winter 2023-2024 season.

programme.title: E36 - Argy - Boussay
programme.desc: An old fortified manor of Berry, the Argy castle is located near Bourges. Its current owner is a direct descendant of the original lords who built it. programme.title: E18 - Art Deco Exhibition/Woad/Manufacture Joseph Duclos/Wide Shoulders

programme.title: E424
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.
SUMMARY OF PRESS: Providing a concise review of what's in the press, the show highlights the important news by presenting newspaper headlines and editorial from respected.
Chief Editor's Time: Daily key issues around the world are discussed on Chief Editor's Time. In-depth analyses and discussion gives viewers a better understanding of the issue.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

The Magic Crane
programme.desc: While the world of martial arts is in probably the most peaceful period for a long while, the Tien Lung Tribe suddenly emerges with a strong military presence as if it were to conquer the warring society. As its presence begin to stir up everyone in the scene, the Court decides to order the leader of the Six Fan Gates – Cho Hung to gather the ten most esteemed tribes for a conference in an attempt to prevent any chaos or unnecessary warfare in the community...

programme.title: Wu Yen
programme.desc: On his hunting trip, Emperor Qi takes a wrong turn and is confronted by bandit leader/wild beauty Wu Yen. The two are immediately attracted to each other. However, an ugly mole on Wu Yen's face thwarts this match made in heaven. Emperor Qi cancels the wedding for fear of marrying someone ugly. The mole is the result of a 'love spell' put by enchantress Yin Chun, who is actually an incarnation of a 3000-years old fox with great magical power...

programme.title: A Taste of Killing and Romance
programme.desc: Judge was one of the top killers of ICE's syndicate. Mr. Tung Fai, a super cop attempted to sue the Triad head, Godfather “Tiger”. Unfortunately, his witness gave false testimony. Worst still, the witness was shot by Judge who impersonated as the presiding Judge in the law court. Meanwhile, Judge met Ru-fung, sister of Ice and both fell in love. The two killers understood they could not have true love. They decided to enjoy love for 3 days, and then separate and return to their killing carrier again.

programme.title: Param Sundari
programme.desc: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.
